expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: shipment checkpoint distinguishes hyperlink styling, contextual navigation behavior, and fallback rendering safety
expectations.evidence: The provided outputs explicitly state Phase 5b checkpoint artifacts are missing, preventing verification that shipment checkpoint coverage distinguishes hyperlink styling, navigation behavior, and fallback rendering safety. Quote: "there are no Phase 5b artifacts (nor any run directory artifacts at all) to evaluate" and "absence of Phase 5b checkpoint artifacts prevents demonstrating ... explicitly covered the focus area (hyperlink styling, contextual navigation behavior, fallback rendering safety)."

expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase5b
expectations.evidence: Outputs indicate non-alignment with Phase 5b due to missing required Phase 5b deliverables (checkpoint_audit, checkpoint_delta, qa_plan_phase5b). Quote: "Specifically missing Phase 5b required outputs: context/checkpoint_audit_BCIN-7547.md, context/checkpoint_delta_BCIN-7547.md, drafts/qa_plan_phase5b_r<round>.md" and "we cannot demonstrate that the orchestrator executed Phase 5b ... produced the required checkpoint outputs."
